title: Understand: resources and population growth
description: Check your understanding of resources and population growth in this set of free practice questions aligned to NGSS standards.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**

Organisms that get more resources are \_\_\_\_\_\_ to survive and have offspring.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: more likely
less likely

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**

Organisms that get fewer resources are \_\_\_\_\_\_ to survive and have offspring.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: more likely
less likely

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**

An organism with plenty of resources is \_\_\_\_\_\_ to survive compared to an organism with few resources.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: more likely
less likely

assessment_items.question_content:
**What effect does a limited resource have on a population’s growth?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: A limited resource can cause a population’s growth to slow down.
A limited resource can cause a population to grow faster.
A limited resource can cause a population to keep growing forever.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these statements about limited resources is true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: A limited resource can cause a population to grow more slowly.
A limited resource can cause a population to grow more quickly.
A limited resource can cause a population to keep growing forever.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**

A limited resource can cause a population to \_\_\_\_\_\_.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: grow more slowly
grow more quickly
keep growing forever

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement about competition in ecosystems is true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Competition often occurs when resources are scarce.
Organisms only compete with other organisms of the same species.
Competition often occurs when organisms need different limited resources.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement about competition in ecosystems is true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Organisms can compete with organisms of a different species.
Competition often occurs when resources are plentiful.
Competition often occurs when organisms need different limited resources.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement about competition in ecosystems is true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Competition often occurs when organisms need the same limited resources.
Competition often occurs when resources are plentiful.
Organisms only compete with other organisms of the same species.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best word to fill in the blank.**

A population with many resources will likely be \_\_\_\_\_\_ than a population with few resources.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: larger
smaller

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best word to fill in the blank.**

A population with few resources will likely be \_\_\_\_\_\_ than a population with many resources.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: larger
smaller

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement about populations is true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: A population with many resources will likely be bigger than a population with few resources.
A population with many resources will likely be smaller than a population with few resources.
